statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 1 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\Admin'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` = 1 and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\Admin'

update `section_data` set `data` = '{\"title\":\"Investment\",\"description\":\"

At Blame Trade Management, we provide a comprehensive investment platform<\/strong> designed to help you grow your wealth with confidence. Our services include real-time market analysis, automated earnings tracking, and expert management strategies<\/strong> to optimize your investments.<\/p>

With our secure and transparent system<\/strong>, you can trade with peace of mind, knowing that your funds are protected by verified security measures<\/strong>. We also offer instant withdrawals<\/strong>, allowing you to access your profits quickly and efficiently.<\/p>

Whether you\'re a beginner or an experienced trader, our platform equips you with the tools, insights, and support<\/strong> needed to make informed decisions and achieve your financial goals.<\/p>\",\"slug\":\"investment\"}', `section_data`.`updated_at` = '2025-02-28 03:42:16' where `id` = 35

We also offer <strong>instant withdrawals<\/strong>, allowing you to access your profits quickly and efficiently.<\/p><p>Whether you're a beginner or an experienced trader, our platform equips you with the <strong>tools, insights, and support<\/strong> needed to make informed decisions and achieve your financial goals.<\/p>","slug":"investment"}
